title: Italian-Style Tofu Curry
description: A fusion dish blending the flavors of Italy and Venezuela, featuring a piquant curry sauce and tender tofu.

ingredients.name: tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the piquant venezuelan curry, diced tomato, and dried basil. Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10-15 minutes or until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh basil if desired.
